title: Understanding Tangential Acceleration
text: Tangential acceleration is the linear acceleration of a point on the rim of a rotating object. It is directly related to the angular acceleration and the radius of the wheel.

title: Formula for Tangential Acceleration
text: The formula to calculate tangential acceleration $$a_t$$ is: $$a_t=\alpha r$$, where alpha is the angular acceleration and $$r$$ is the radius of the wheel.

title: Calculate Tangential Acceleration
text: Given that the angular acceleration (alpha) is $$4.0$$ $$\frac{rad}{s^2}$$ and the radius (r) is $$1.0$$ $$m$$, calculate the tangential acceleration.
